title: 8 tinctures for hysterectomy patients with hot flashes
description: Cimicifuga racemosa tinctures are often used to help alleviate hot flashes in menopausal women. The tincture is made from the root of the Black Cohosh plant, which contains properties and constituents such as isoflavones, triterpene glycosides, and phenolic acids. These compounds are thought to interact with neurotransmitters in the brain, particularly serotonin and acetylcholine, to regulate body temperature and reduce the frequency and severity of hot flashes.
